hero.title: Scientific Innovation at the Service of Your Project
hero.description: We merge cutting-edge technological tools with solid scientific backing to deliver professional, technical, and specialized solutions that accelerate your organization's growth and productivity.

about.title: Science and Technology in Action
about.description: Bitrixa springs from a passion for creating, precision, and a steadfast commitment to technical quality. We are devoted to delivering specialized scientific and technological services under a comprehensive model tailored to each client.

services.title: Specialized Services
services.description: We place at your disposal a complete range of scientific-technological services designed to take your company to the next level of performance.

items.title: Scientific Analysis and Consulting
items.description: We tackle each project with a deep scientific perspective, examining every detail through custom studies that combine controlled experiments, mathematical simulations, and high-level statistics. The outcome: validated processes, visible areas for improvement, and strategic decisions supported by verifiable information. Our consulting adapts to any industry while upholding the most stringent quality standards.
beneficios: Detailed, easy-to-interpret technical reports that guide key decisions.
Verification of processes and products using scientific methods that reduce errors and uncertainty.
Early detection of innovation opportunities backed by objective data.
Ongoing support to refine and enhance based on tangible evidence.

items.title: Regulatory and Technical Compliance Advisory
items.description: Navigating regulations can become a maze for any business. We guide you step by step so that every part of your operation (from products to services) aligns with the technical and legal provisions governing your industry. We review current legislation, prepare the necessary documentation, and design workflows that keep legal risks at bay while paving the way toward audits and certifications, freeing you to focus on growing your company.
beneficios: Protection against fines and legal disputes arising from regulatory breaches.
Comprehensive guidance for preparing and presenting your case before certification bodies.
Creation of internal routines that maintain current and up-to-date compliance.
Time and cost savings in every audit and certification cycle.
Increased credibility and confidence projected to clients, partners, and stakeholders.

items.title: Specialized Technical Training
items.description: Keeping knowledge fresh is what sets leading companies apart. Our training programs equip your staff with the skills needed to face technical and scientific challenges with confidence and ease. We deliver sessions blending theory and practice on the latest trends in methods, tools, and regulations, adapting to each organization's current situation and goals. The immediate effect is a more prepared, enthusiastic team focused on adding real value to business objectives.
beneficios: Continuous updating that places your workforce at the forefront of their discipline.
Strengthening of essential technical and scientific aptitudes to boost performance.
Transfer of knowledge that can be applied immediately in daily tasks.
Fluid internal communication and teamwork through contemporary dynamics.
Increased productivity and fewer operational failures.

items.title: Technical and Scientific Software Development
items.description: We build unique digital tools for technical and scientific environments: applications, web platforms, and systems that simplify the management, processing, and simulation of complex information. We accompany every stage, from the initial sketch to launch, carefully ensuring ease of use, data protection, and frictionless scalability. The goal is to deliver solutions that automate repetitive tasks while enhancing advanced data interpretation for better decision-making.
beneficios: Custom applications addressing real needs in the technical-scientific field.
Automation of complex processes that lightens manual workloads and reduces mistakes.
Platform integration that streamlines data flow and collaborative work.
Powerful data reading and visualization tools to extract business intelligence.
Ongoing maintenance and evolution of the system to preserve its performance and security.

items.title: Technological Development and Innovation
items.description: In an era where everything moves at breakneck speed, staying on the cutting edge of technology is a decisive advantage. We create customized solutions that reinvent your production and management processes by incorporating advanced resources such as automation, artificial intelligence, and real-time monitoring. Our goal is clear: raise performance, cut operational expenses, and broaden your company's capacity to respond nimbly to upcoming challenges.
beneficios: A notable leap in operational performance through intelligent task automation.
Reduced costs and timelines tied to manual or outdated methods.
Adoption of adaptable technologies that accompany the natural evolution of your business.
Real-time data availability for fast, well-documented decision-making.
Strengthened competitive positioning both in domestic and international markets.

items.title: Quality Management and Control
items.description: Achieving excellence in what you offer is essential to stand out in increasingly competitive markets. We establish quality assurance and supervision schemes that verify compliance with rigorous standards —both local and international— at every stage of the process. Through periodic inspections, audits, and tests, we confirm conformity and drive sustained improvement, protecting the reputation and trust your customers have placed in your brand.
beneficios: Dramatic reduction of failures, defects, and rework, with the resulting resource savings.
Certainty of alignment with official standards, opening doors to new markets.
Progressive improvement of processes and products that increases customer loyalty.
Consolidation of corporate reputation through widely recognized quality seals.
Specific training for teams in quality systems and practices.

products.title: Solutions Tailored to You
products.description: Explore our premium options designed for organizations pursuing superior quality, innovative spirit, and measurable achievements.

contact.title: We Are Here to Help
contact.description: Tell us about your initiative and discover how we can boost your business through cutting-edge scientific and technological solutions.

form.description: At Bitrixa we put transparency, excellence, and responsibility first, ensuring that every service generates concrete and demonstrable value for your company.

about.title: Science and Technology in Action
about.description1: Our reason for being is to translate intricate information and operations into crisp, functional responses tailored to what you truly need, whether in domestic or cross-border initiatives.
about.description2: We span from applied research and technical guidance to new development engineering, serving as the strategic partner every ambitious project requires when seeking precision, accuracy, and verifiable impact.
about.description3: Discover where the scientific method and technological resources intertwine at Bitrixa to inject speed into your evolution.

value.title: Our Pillars
value.description: A multidisciplinary team of specialists, cutting-edge technological infrastructure, and refined procedures that propel your business into a new dimension of innovation and competitive advantage.
value.commitmentContent: Lies in deciphering tangled operational realities and information flows to turn them into clean, effective strategies aligned with your particular circumstances, whether the project operates locally or crosses borders.
value.missionContent: To open paths toward avant-garde solutions where the rigor of scientific thinking merges with the latest technological advances, in order to multiply the reach and effectiveness of every venture.
value.teamContent: We bring together high-level specialists in fields such as engineering, data intelligence, regulatory advisory, technology creation, and scientific consulting, who pool their talent to provide you with solid and scalable certainties.

sections.title: Identity and Responsibility
sections.content1: BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V., commercially known as BITRIXA, is a Mexican business entity specialized in the convergence of science, technology, and applied innovation. Our digital laboratory Bitrixa.com.mx represents the epicenter of professional, scientific, and technical services designed to drive business development through cutting-edge methodologies.
contact: • Legal Name: BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V.
• Physical Location: AVENIDA INSURGENTES SUR, N°933, INT 102 PISO 1, COLONIA NAPOLES, ALCALDIA BENITO JUAREZ, C.P. 03810, CDMX
sections.content3: Regulatory Ecosystem: This code operates under the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, its executive regulations, and the specialized guidelines of the National Institute for Transparency, Access to Information, and Personal Data Protection.

subsections.heading: Professional Identification Data
subsections.content: We collect essential information to establish your identity in the context of our scientific and technical services: full name, government identifiers such as RFC and CURP, relevant chronological information, and geographic location data to facilitate in-person services when required.

subsections.heading: Business and Technical Information
subsections.content: We capture data related to your organizational entity, including legal name, primary economic activity, corporate structure, tax information necessary for compliance, and technical project specifications to customize our scientific services according to your specific requirements.

subsections.heading: Digital Interaction Metadata
subsections.content: Our systems automatically record browsing patterns, technical content preferences, download history of scientific resources, device configurations used to access our services, and engagement metrics with our specialized content.

subsections.heading: Communications and Technical Documentation
subsections.content: We store project-related communications, technical documentation shared during consulting processes, scientific project files and specifications, progress reports and service results, as well as feedback and service satisfaction evaluations.

subsections.heading: Core Operations (Contractual Purposes)
subsections.content: Scientific and Technical Services: We use your information to execute scientific consulting, technological development, specialized technical advisory, and innovation project management. This includes methodology customization based on your organization's technical profile and deliverable optimization according to agreed specifications. Consulting Relationship Management: We manage ongoing communication during project development, schedule deliveries and follow-ups according to established timelines, process billing and financial aspects related to contracted services, and maintain complete documentation of processes and results to ensure scientific traceability. Regulatory and Tax Compliance: We process information necessary to satisfy tax obligations, maintain records required by competent authorities, generate compliance reports when requested, and manage legal aspects related to intellectual property generated during collaborations.

subsections.heading: Value-Added Applications (Secondary Purposes)
subsections.content: Scientific Knowledge Development: We use aggregated and anonymized data for technology trend research, development of new scientific methodologies, creation of case studies benefiting the sector, and contribution to knowledge advancement in specialized areas where we operate. Specialized Communication: We send information about relevant scientific advances in your sector, invitations to technical conferences and professional networking events, notifications about new services complementing your business profile, and educational content strengthening your organization's internal technical capabilities. Experience Personalization: We adapt our digital content according to your area of expertise, recommend services based on your project history, create customized dashboards for initiative tracking, and develop interfaces optimized for your specific workflow.

subsections.heading: Opt-Out Statement
subsections.content: If you prefer your data not to be used for value-added applications, you may expressly notify us at informacion@bitrixa.com.mx. This decision will not compromise the quality or availability of our core services.

subsections.heading: Essential Functionality Cookies
subsections.content: These technologies ensure the basic operation of our digital laboratory, maintaining active sessions during the use of technical tools, preserving security configurations to protect sensitive project information, and facilitating smooth navigation between different sections of our specialized services.

subsections.heading: Scientific Personalization Cookies
subsections.content: We implement technologies that automatically adapt content according to your scientific discipline or technical area of interest, remembering technical data visualization preferences, preserving analytical tool configurations, and optimizing the presentation of complex information according to your declared specialization level.

subsections.heading: Advanced Analytics Cookies
subsections.content: We use Google Analytics 4 specifically configured for scientific and technical environments, along with proprietary tools that analyze usage patterns of technical resources, measure consulting methodology effectiveness, identify improvement opportunities in delivery processes, and evaluate satisfaction with specialized services.

subsections.heading: Professional Engagement Cookies
subsections.content: We implement LinkedIn Campaign Manager to reach relevant technical audiences, Google Ads targeted at science and technology professionals, and remarketing systems that present advanced scientific content to visitors with identified technical profiles.

rights.heading: Right of Scientific Access
rights.content: You may request a detailed report of all personal information we process, including collection context, specific purposes of use, modification history, identification of third parties who have had access, applied security measures, and complete timeline of your data processing.

rights.heading: Right of Technical Rectification
rights.content: You have the ability to update information that has changed, correct inaccurate data that may affect the quality of our services, complete missing information to improve service personalization, and modify communication and data processing preferences as your needs evolve.

rights.heading: Right of Controlled Cancellation
rights.content: You may request the deletion of specific categories of personal data, the complete removal of your information from our systems, the retention only of data required by law, or the anonymization of information for statistical uses that do not allow personal identification.

rights.heading: Right of Strategic Opposition
rights.content: You may object to the use of your data for specific purposes while keeping other services active, suspend commercial communications while retaining technical services, limit processing to contractual purposes only, or establish granular restrictions on specific types of processing.

rights.heading: Right of Scientific Portability
rights.content: We deliver your data in industry-standard structured formats, compatible with common scientific tools, organized according to recognized technical taxonomies, and accompanied by metadata facilitating its interpretation and use in other systems.

rights.heading: Right of Processing Limitation
rights.content: You may request the temporary suspension of processing while disputes about accuracy or legality are resolved, during contract or terms of service review periods, when there are pending legal proceedings, or while requests for exercising other rights are being evaluated.

steps.label: Required Documentation:
items: Valid official identification of the holder or legal representative
Clear and detailed specification of the right you wish to exercise
Precise description of the data subject to the request
Documents proving the contractual or service relationship

steps.label: Response Timeline:
items: Acknowledgment of receipt: approximately 2 business days
Substantive response: 20 business days from receipt
Request implementation: 15 business days after response
Completion notification: 3 business days after implementation

sections.title: Specialized Communication Channel
sections.content: Privacy Center of Excellence - BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V. Data Protection Division – BITRIXA

subsections.heading: Nature of the Digital Ecosystem
subsections.content: BITRIXA is a digital platform specialized in the convergence of science, technology, and innovation, operated by BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V., a Mexican commercial entity dedicated to the development and provision of professional, scientific, and technical services for organizations seeking to accelerate their innovation and technological development capacity.

subsections.heading: Territorial and Jurisdictional Scope
subsections.content: These terms govern access to and use of all services, tools, content, and functionalities available through the Bitrixa.com.mx domain and any subdomain, mobile application, API, widget, or associated technology that we expressly identify as part of the BITRIXA ecosystem.

subsections.heading: Contractual Basis
subsections.content: Access to our services implies the formation of a valid contract between you and BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V., subject to applicable Mexican laws. If you act on behalf of an organization, you declare under oath that you have sufficient authority to contractually bind said entity.

sections.title: Classification of Scientific and Technical Services

subsections.heading: Scientific Consulting Services
subsections.content: Comprehensive Technological Diagnosis: We conduct thorough evaluations of current technological capabilities, identification of gaps in innovation processes, organizational digital maturity analysis, and development of customized scientific roadmaps that optimize resources and accelerate research and development results. Specialized Methodology Development: We create customized frameworks for scientific project management, sector-specific applied research protocols, innovation impact measurement systems, and technology transfer methodologies that facilitate the practical implementation of scientific advances. Strategic Innovation Advisory: We provide specialized guidance in R&D+i strategy formulation, technical and commercial feasibility assessment of innovative projects, intellectual property management, and development of strategic alliances with academic institutions and research centers.

subsections.heading: Specialized Technological Platforms
subsections.content: Scientific Analysis Tools: We offer access to specialized software for mathematical modeling, process simulation, advanced statistical analysis, and complex scientific data visualization that facilitates decision-making based on rigorous scientific evidence. Technical Project Management Systems: We provide integrated platforms for research project planning, scientific milestone tracking, R&D resource and budget management, and collaboration among geographically distributed multidisciplinary teams. Scientific Resource Libraries: We maintain updated repositories of industry best practices, technical case study databases, algorithm and mathematical model libraries, and collections of international standards relevant to different scientific sectors.

subsections.heading: Training and Development Services
subsections.content: Technical Update Programs: We design and implement specialized training programs in emerging technologies, advanced scientific methodologies, data analysis tools, and innovation management techniques adapted to each organization's specific needs. Personalized Scientific Mentoring: We provide individualized support for researchers and technologists, scientific career development guidance, research project formulation advisory, and specialized coaching in technical team leadership.

subsections.heading: Requirements for Organizations
subsections.content: Organizational entities wishing to access our services must have legal personality duly constituted in accordance with applicable laws in their jurisdiction, full legal capacity to contract specialized professional services, formal designation of authorized representatives for technical and financial decision-making, and current compliance with all tax and regulatory obligations.

subsections.heading: Criteria for Individual Users
subsections.content: Individual users require legal age (18 years completed) in their jurisdiction of residence, full legal capacity without limitations affecting their ability to understand and fulfill contractual obligations, relevant technical training or professional experience to effectively leverage our specialized services, and acting on their own behalf or with duly accredited representation of third parties.

subsections.heading: Professional and Ethical Standards
subsections.content: All users must commit to maintaining the highest standards of scientific integrity in using our services, respecting principles of intellectual honesty and transparency in communicating results, complying with applicable regulations regarding research and development in their sector, and contributing to the ethical advancement of scientific knowledge through responsible practices.

sections.title: Code of Conduct and Appropriate Use

subsections.heading: Permitted and Encouraged Activities
subsections.content: We authorize and encourage the use of our services for legitimate advancement of scientific knowledge, development of innovative technological solutions that benefit society, ethical collaboration among researchers and organizations, application of rigorous scientific methodologies in business projects, and contribution to the innovation ecosystem through responsible sharing of learnings and best practices.

subsections.heading: Restrictions and Prohibited Activities
subsections.content: We expressly prohibit the use of our services for activities that violate third-party intellectual property rights, development of technologies with potential for social or environmental harm without appropriate ethical assessment, manipulation or falsification of scientific data, unfair competition through misuse of privileged information obtained through our services, and any activity that contravenes fundamental ethical principles of scientific research.

subsections.heading: Responsibilities in Information Use
subsections.content: Users assume complete responsibility for the ethical and legal use of information, tools, and services provided, including compliance with applicable regulations in their jurisdiction, adequate protection of confidential information shared during collaborations, appropriate acknowledgment of sources and contributions in derived publications or developments, and immediate notification of any inappropriate use or identified security breach.

subsections.heading: Exclusive Rights of BADOLIA DISEÑOS
subsections.content: We maintain exclusive and irrevocable ownership over all methodologies, algorithms, mathematical models, analytical frameworks, proprietary software tools, compiled databases, internally developed educational content, interface and user experience designs, registered trademarks and corporate identity elements, and any innovation or improvement developed in the course of service provision.

subsections.heading: Licenses Granted to Users
subsections.content: We grant limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable licenses to use our tools and platforms during the term of service contracts, access educational content for internal organizational use exclusively, implement provided methodologies in specific contracted projects, and use analysis results for internal business decision-making.

subsections.heading: Collaborative Ownership and Joint Developments
subsections.content: In projects involving joint solution development, we establish specific agreements that clearly define ownership of resulting innovations, usage and commercial exploitation rights, mutual acknowledgment obligations, and dispute resolution mechanisms regarding emerging intellectual property.

subsections.heading: Client Confidential Information Protection
subsections.content: We recognize and respect our clients' exclusive ownership over their business data, proprietary technical information, trade secrets shared during collaborations, specific results of customized projects, and any innovation developed primarily with client resources and knowledge.

subsections.heading: Obligations of BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V.
subsections.content: We commit to providing services in accordance with the highest professional industry standards, maintaining digital platform availability of 99.5% annually excluding scheduled maintenance notified in advance, assigning qualified and certified technical personnel for project execution, implementing robust security measures for confidential information protection, and delivering results conforming to agreed specifications within established timelines.

subsections.heading: User Responsibilities
subsections.content: Users assume obligations to provide complete, accurate, and updated information necessary for effective service delivery, actively collaborate in project execution through assignment of competent personnel and adequate resources, implement recommendations according to scientific best practices, maintain confidentiality of proprietary methodologies and tools, and comply with payment terms and established contractual conditions.

subsections.heading: Liability Limitations and Scope
subsections.content: Advisory Nature of Services: Our services constitute specialized technical advisory based on scientific knowledge and industry best practices. We do not guarantee specific results nor assume responsibility for business or technical decisions made based on our recommendations, as external variables and specific organizational factors may significantly influence final outcomes. Exclusion of Indirect Liability: BADOLIA DISEÑOS S.A. DE C.V. shall not be liable under any circumstances for indirect damages, loss of business opportunity, interruption of production processes, data loss not attributable to our systems, or consequential damages beyond the direct control of our professional services.

subsections.heading: Differentiated Billing Models
subsections.content: Project-Based Services: We quote specific projects through detailed analysis of scope, technical complexity, required resources, and execution timeline. Billing is structured by delivery milestones with staggered payments reflecting incremental value generated in each project phase. Scientific Consulting Retainer: For organizations requiring continuous access to technical expertise, we offer monthly retainer models that guarantee priority consultant availability, preferential access to new tools, and preferential pricing on additional projects.

These terms are interpreted exclusively in accordance with Mexican federal legislation, particularly the Federal Civil Code, Federal Consumer Protection Law, and Commercial Code. The parties expressly submit to federal courts of Mexico City for non-arbitrable disputes.

subsections.heading: Modifications and Updates
subsections.content: We review these terms annually to incorporate technological evolution, changes in industry best practices, regulatory updates, and user feedback on clarity and practical applicability. Substantial modifications require 45 days advance notice and a 15-day comment period.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.guarantee: We guarantee scientific and technical services with verifiable results.
refunds.address: Avenida Insurgentes Sur, Nº933, Int 102, Piso 1, Colonia Nápoles, Alcaldía Benito Juárez, C.P, 03810, CDMX

sections.title: Scientific Excellence in Customer Satisfaction
sections.content: At BITRIXA we are governed by the principle that every scientific and technical service must generate tangible and measurable value for our clients. Our refund policy applies only to professional services, guaranteeing transparency and fairness in cases where agreed standards are not met.

sections.title: Scope
sections.content: This policy applies to services offered by BITRIXA, including but not limited to:
items: Development of methodologies applied to R&D processes.
Technological platform services and analysis tools.
Training, certification, and scientific mentoring programs.

sections.title: Refund Conditions
sections.content: The client may request a refund only in the following cases:
numberedItems: Breach of technical specifications documented in the contract or service proposal.
Serious deficiencies in deliverables that directly affect the usefulness of the contracted service.
Unjustified delays exceeding 40% of the agreed schedule and attributable to BITRIXA.
Persistent technical failures in platforms or tools that prevent use of the service.
Cancellation of the service by BITRIXA before its full execution.

sections.title: Limitations
items: Refunds do not apply when the service has already been fully provided or entirely used by the client.
Refunds will not be granted for causes attributable to the client (lack of participation, delays in delivering information, failure to meet own technical requirements).
Certifications and accreditations issued are non-refundable once issued.

sections.title: Request Procedure
sections.content: Requests must be made in writing to informacion@bitrixa.com.mx accompanied by:
numberedItems: Name or legal name of the contracting party.
Proof of payment and billing information.
Contracted service, dates, and agreed deliverables.
sections.footer: BITRIXA will analyze the request within 10 to 15 business days and notify the client of the resolution. If approved, the refund will be made through the same payment method used in the original transaction.

sections.title: Final Provisions
sections.content: This policy takes effect upon publication and will apply to all contracts entered into after that date. BITRIXA reserves the right to modify this policy with 15 calendar days' prior notice through its official channels. The interpretation and application of this policy shall be governed by Mexican law and the corresponding jurisdiction in accordance with BITRIXA's general Terms and Conditions.
